creator: nimaje+fbz@bureaucracy.de
text: Trying to build sysutils/ipfs-go resulted in poudriere complaining about a nonexisting origin. As that origin existed before that is unexpected and poudriere should have showed an entry from MOVED that explained what happened to the port. As there is no entry explaining what happend, I had to find commit fc2f8f7ed067de1d4b2682cb5cf8a65807d81978 to figure out that it got renamed to kubo-go
